examples.name: Data Generator
examples.description: Generate structured data using AI agents

examples.name: Data Validation Pipeline
examples.description: Validate and clean data for quality assurance before processing.

examples.name: Photo Enhancement Suite
examples.description: Batch enhance photos with AI-powered improvements including color correction and upscaling.

examples.name: Music Video Visualizer
examples.description: Create reactive visuals from audio tracks with mood-matched imagery. Transcribes audio, analyzes mood/energy, and generates visual frames synced to the music.

examples.name: Conditional Logic Engine
examples.description: Workflow that demonstrates multi-branch decision logic with value routing.

examples.name: Competitive Analysis
examples.description: Analyze competitor offerings and market positioning for strategic planning. Fetches competitor information from Google search results.

examples.name: Story to Video Generator
examples.description: Transform story ideas into cinematic AI-generated videos. An agent crafts detailed visual prompts optimized for video generation, then creates the video using Gemini Veo.

examples.name: Data Visualization Pipeline
examples.description: Transform natural language descriptions into data visualizations with AI-powered data and chart generation. This workflow demonstrates how to create customized charts from text prompts without manual data preparation.

examples.name: Agent Google Search
examples.description: Demonstrates an Agent using dynamic outputs to perform Google searches and display results.

examples.name: Instagram Scraper
examples.description: Analyze Instagram trends for a specific topic.

examples.name: Summarize Audio
examples.description: Transcribe an audio file and summarize the text.

examples.name: Concept Art Iteration Board
examples.description: Turn a creative brief, style, and mood into concept art variations. An agent sets the art direction, then a batch of images is generated.

examples.name: Wikipedia Agent
examples.description: Wikipedia style research and documentation agent.

examples.name: Social Media Calendar Filler
examples.description: Generate a month's worth of social media content with images, captions, and hashtags. Plans content based on monthly themes and brand guidelines.

examples.name: Meeting Transcript Summarizer
examples.description: Automatically transcribe a meeting recording and generate concise notes.

examples.name: Product Mockup Generator
examples.description: Generate product mockups for a given product.

examples.name: Brand Asset Generator
examples.description: Generate brand assets for a given brand.

examples.name: Hacker News Agent
examples.description: Scrape and analyze the front page of Hacker News.

examples.name: Transcribe Audio
examples.description: Convert speech to text using Whisper model with word-level timestamps

examples.name: Learning Path Generator
examples.description: Create a comprehensive learning path for a topic.

examples.name: Creative Story Ideas
examples.description: A beginner-friendly template demonstrating core NodeTool concepts: inputs, templates, LLM agents, streaming, and outputs. Generate creative story ideas based on your preferences.

examples.name: Audio To Image
examples.description: Transform spoken descriptions into images with this workflow. Record or upload audio, which is transcribed by Whisper and then visualized by Stable Diffusion. Perfect for quickly generating images from verbal ideas without typing.

examples.name: Fetch Papers
examples.description: This workflow automatically fetches and downloads research papers from the Awesome Transformers GitHub repository. It extracts paper links from the README.md file, filters for actual papers, and downloads them to a specified folder. Ideal for researchers and AI enthusiasts who want to stay updated with the latest transformer model papers.

examples.name: Flashcard Generator
examples.description: Generate study flashcards using AI and store them persistently in a database. Enter any topic and get instant flashcards that are saved for future review.

examples.name: Add Subtitles To Video
examples.description: This workflow automatically transcribes speech in videos and adds subtitles. It extracts audio from the input video, uses OpenAI's Whisper model to generate word-level timestamps and transcriptions, and then renders the subtitles back onto the original video. Perfect for creating accessible content, adding captions to social media videos, or transcribing presentations.

examples.name: Image Enhance
examples.description: Improve image quality with basic enhancement tools like sharpening, contrast and color adjustment

examples.name: Reddit Scraper
examples.description: Analyze a subreddit for specific issues.

examples.name: Movie Posters
examples.description: Create cinematic movie posters using AI image generation

examples.name: Image To Audio Story
examples.description: Generate and narrate creative stories from images using AI

examples.name: Game Encounter Planner Agent
examples.description: Coordinate a squad of AI agents to design, critique, and brief a Frostfang Tundra combat encounter using StructuredOutputGenerator for robust schema enforcement.

examples.name: Research Paper Summarizer
examples.description: Extract and summarize key findings from research papers and technical documents.

examples.name: YouTube Thumbnail Pipeline
examples.description: Generate multiple eye-catching YouTube thumbnail variations from video scripts. Creates bold text overlays, dramatic styling, and batch processes variations for A/B testing.

examples.name: YouTube Research with Claude Agent
examples.description: Search YouTube using SerpAPI and analyze results with Claude Agent for deep research insights.

examples.name: Image to Video Animation
examples.description: Generate a high-quality still from text, then animate it into a short cinematic clip.

examples.name: AI Product Launch Video Generator
examples.description: Create a realistic 16:9 marketing video for a new product launch using the TextToVideo node.

examples.name: Product Description Generator
examples.description: Automatically generate marketing copy and product descriptions from product data.

examples.name: Movie Trailer Generator
examples.description: Type a single logline and get back a narrated cinematic teaser. Prompt nodes template the inputs into a treatment, turn each generated shot into full cinematic key art, and write the voiceover; the keyframes are cut into a trailer with AI narration.
